name: email-optimizer
description: Your welcome sequence has a 12% open rate and you're not sure why. Paste your existing emails and get back a line-by-line audit: what's killing your opens, where you're losing readers, and rewritten versions that fix each issue. Includes A/B test suggestions and conversion scoring.
tagline: Audit and fix your email sequences

skills.name: optimize
skills.description: Audit existing email sequences and generate optimized versions

outputDescription: A per-email audit with scores, issue diagnosis, and complete rewrites, plus sequence-level flow analysis, timing recommendations, and a prioritized A/B test plan.
